title: december '24
content:
my sweetest days have begun the 22nd day of this month.

Do you remember that room with its wilted floors and low hanging ceilings?

Do you remember our first date? it's been a while now.

I'm sure the me back then would just wonder how he was able to get the girl of his dreams to be with him.. life's really unpredictable in some ways yk... still, haha, tangina nung ramyun place sa sta.lucia overpriced.
replyPrompt: what were you actually thinking back then?

title: january '25
content: Kinda weird not having a new year's resolution where we 'keep strong', kasi it felt too early wahahahaha.  Back then I couldn't make it to Antipolo and I immediately went to be with my family sa Morong. It was memorable still as it was the starting point for this journey.
